title: pygeum latifolium var. macrocarpum
intro: Pygeum latifolium var. macrocarpum, also known as the African Prune or Pygeum, is a type of plant native to Africa, and is a variant of the Pygeum latifolium tree. It has been found to have medicinal properties due to its high content of sterols, particularly beta-sitosterol, which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pygeum latifolium var. macrocarpum include the potential to alleviate urinary tract problems, such as benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH), and to improve overall prostate health. Pygeum latifolium var. macrocarpum is commonly used in herbal preparations, including capsules, tablets, and extracts, which are often standardized to contain a specific amount of the active compounds.
